summary: Completed testing of Program Filtering Features (BookingPage filters, Admin URL generator, AuditLogPage). All 16 backend tests pass (100%). All frontend UI flows verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: BookingPage filter implementation is clean with AGE_FILTER_OPTIONS mapping URL codes to internal keys
Client-side filtering uses useMemo for performance with filteredPrograms
URL params are correctly read with useSearchParams and auto-open filter panel
Admin URL generator correctly builds URLs with ?age= params using URLSearchParams
Backend _matches_age() function properly checks age_categories first, then target_groups, then age_group as fallback
AuditLogPage correctly displays paginated audit entries with entity type filter
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo institution programs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Program filtering fully tested. Institution ID: 669e71b2-a8e7-4eb0-ac13-8b8c4f3107a5. BookingPage URL: /booking/{institution_id}?age=MS,ZS1&duration=short. Age codes: MS, ZS1, ZS2, SS, GYM. Duration values: short (<60min), medium (60-120min), long (>120min). Admin URL generator at /admin/programs with 'Generovat URL pro web' button. AuditLogPage at /admin/audit-log (currently 0 records). All filter UI elements have data-testid attributes: toggle-filters-btn, filter-panel, filter-age-{code}, filter-duration, clear-filters-btn, url-age-filter-{code}, url-select-all, external-url-input, copy-url-btn.

verified_features.feature: BookingPage filter UI: clicking 'Filtrovat programy' toggle shows filter panel
BookingPage filter functionality: clicking MŠ filter shows only MŠ programs
BookingPage URL param loading: /booking/{id}?age=MS auto-opens filters with MŠ pre-selected
BookingPage URL param loading: /booking/{id}?age=ZS1,ZS2 shows ZŠ I. + ZŠ II. programs
BookingPage clear filters: 'Zrušit filtry' button resets to show all programs
BookingPage empty state: selecting GYM filter shows appropriate message
Admin ProgramsPage URL generator: clicking 'Generovat URL pro web' opens modal
Admin ProgramsPage URL generator: selecting age filters includes ?age= in URL
Admin ProgramsPage URL generator: copy button works for URL with filters
AuditLogPage: navigating to /admin/audit-log shows audit log with entity filter
Backend API: GET /api/programs/public/{id}?age=MS returns only MŠ programs
Backend API: GET /api/programs/public/{id}?age=ZS1,ZS2 returns ZŠ I. + ZŠ II. programs
Backend API: GET /api/audit-log returns paginated audit entries
